scripts.build: bun run clean && tsc && vite build && bun build-server.ts
scripts.preview: bun run build && bun run start
scripts.stress:front: bun --cwd ../packages/nuclo-core run build && bun run build && bunx playwright test tests/front-stress.spec.ts
scripts.stress:front:strict: bun --cwd ../packages/nuclo-core run build && bun run build && STRESS_STRICT=true bunx playwright test tests/front-stress.spec.ts
scripts.stress:front:ui: bun --cwd ../packages/nuclo-core run build && bun run build && bunx playwright test tests/front-stress.spec.ts --headed --project=stress-chromium
